segments.text: JULIE: Remind me, Trevor ... how long is the presentation?
segments.translation: 朱莉：提醒我一下，特雷弗……我们的陈述时间是多少来着？

segments.text: TREVOR: Dr White said three per hour.
segments.translation: 特雷弗：怀特博士说每小时三场。

segments.text: JULIE: So about twenty minutes?
segments.translation: 朱莉：所以是20分钟对吧？

segments.text: TREVOR: Well ... it'll be fifteen minutes per presentation.
segments.translation: 特雷弗：呃……陈述的时间是15分钟。

segments.text: JULIE: And five minutes for questions?
segments.translation: 朱莉：剩下5分钟是提问环节?

segments.text: TREVOR: And is this one going to be assessed?
segments.translation: 特雷弗：这次陈述会被评估吗？

segments.text: JULIE: No ... not this time round ... because it's the first one ... you know.
segments.translation: 朱莉：不会……这次不会……因为这是第一次……你懂的。

segments.text: TREVOR: Good news.
segments.translation: 特雷弗：太好了。

segments.text: JULIE: Well, Trevor, what are we going to include?
segments.translation: 朱莉：对了，特雷弗，我们的陈述都需要包括什么呀？

segments.text: TREVOR: Well ... Do you think we ought to give some historical background?
segments.translation: 特雷弗：这个……你觉得我们要交待一下历史背景吗？

segments.text: JULIE: Oh no ... definitely not ... we won't have time!
segments.translation: 朱莉：不用……当然不用……时间不够啊！

segments.text: TREVOR: OK ... but I think we ought to say something about the geographical location ... cos not a lot of people know where the islands are ...
segments.translation: 特雷弗：好的……但我觉得我们得交待一下地理位置……因为不是所有人都知道这个小岛在哪儿。

segments.text: JULIE: Yes ... OK ... I'll take notes, shall I?
segments.translation: 朱莉：是的……好的……我记一下吧。

segments.text: TREVOR: Yeah, that'll be a help ...
segments.translation: 特雷弗：好呀，一会儿用得着的……

segments.text: JULIE: So ... geographical location ...
segments.translation: 朱莉：好的……地理位置……

segments.text: TREVOR: Then we ought to give an overview of the whole education system.
segments.translation: 特雷弗：然后我们要大致介绍一下整体的教育体系。

segments.text: JULIE: Shouldn't we say something about the economy ... you know agricultural produce ... minerals and so forth?
segments.translation: 朱莉：我们要提到经济吗？农业生产啊，矿产啊什么的？

segments.text: TREVOR: Well ... Dr White said we shouldn't go into that sort of detail.
segments.translation: 特雷弗：嗯……怀特博士说这类细节信息不用提。

segments.text: JULIE: But it's pretty important when you think about it ... you know because it does influence the education system ...
segments.translation: 朱莉：但我觉得这个还挺重要的……因为经济确实会影响教育体系……

segments.text: TREVOR: Look ... let's think about that one later shall we?
segments.translation: 特雷弗：这样吧……我们一会儿再聊这个好吗？

segments.text: Let's see how we're doing for time ...
segments.translation: 咱们到时候看看时间够不够……

segments.text: JULIE: OK ... so ... general overview of education.
segments.translation: 朱莉：好的……教育的大致介绍。

segments.text: TREVOR: Of course ... and then the role of English language ...
segments.translation: 特雷弗：没错……然后是英语语言的地位……

segments.text: JULIE: Nope ... that goes in the Language Policy Seminar ... don't you remember?
segments.translation: 朱莉：不对……你忘了吗，这个是放在语言政策研讨会里说的。

segments.text: TREVOR: Are you sure?
segments.translation: 特雷弗：你确定吗？

segments.text: JULIE: Positive.
segments.translation: 朱莉：我确定。

segments.text: TREVOR: All right ... so those are the topics we're going to be ... to be covering ...
segments.translation: 特雷弗：好的……我们就说这些话题……

segments.text: JULIE: We need to think about what to prepare ...
segments.translation: 朱莉：我们要想想怎么准备……

segments.text: Dr White said he wanted us to use plenty of visuals and things and we might as well try them out when we're not being assessed ...
segments.translation: 怀特博士说他希望我们加上大量的视觉元素，所以在评估前我们可以多做些尝试……

segments.text: TREVOR: Well, the most important thing is the overhead projector ...
segments.translation: 特雷弗：嗯，最重要的是投影仪……

segments.text: JULIE: No problem ... we'll get that from the media room ... must remember to book it ...
segments.translation: 朱莉：没问题……记得在媒体室预定一台…

segments.text: TREVOR: Well ... we'll need a map of course.
segments.translation: 特雷弗：好的……我们还需要一张地图。

segments.text: JULIE: Probably two ... one of the islands ... large scale.
segments.translation: 朱莉：要两张……一张是大比例的岛屿地图。

segments.text: TREVOR: And one of West Africa.
segments.translation: 特雷弗：还要一张西非地图。

segments.text: JULIE: Well, the West African one is no problem ...
segments.translation: 朱莉：嗯，西非地图没问题……

segments.text: There's one in the Resources Room.
segments.translation: 资料室里面有一张。

segments.text: TREVOR: Oh yeah, of course, the resources room; the islands are going to be more of a problem.
segments.translation: 特雷弗：噢，对啊，资料室；岛屿地图倒是个问题。

segments.text: JULIE: Tell you what ... there's a very clear map of Santiago in that tourist brochure I showed you last week. Don't you remember it?
segments.translation: 朱莉：上周我给你看的旅游宣传册上有一张很清晰的圣地亚哥地图。你还记得吗？

segments.text: TREVOR: Oh yeah ... that's right; we can just use the tourist brochure.
segments.translation: 特雷弗：噢，对呀；我们可以就用那份旅游宣传册。

segments.text: JULIE: We also need statistics ... on several different things.
segments.translation: 朱莉：我们还需要一些数据……好几个方面的。

segments.text: TREVOR: Literacy rates.
segments.translation: 特雷弗：识字率是一个。

segments.text: JULIE: Yes, and school places.
segments.translation: 朱莉：是的，还有学校分布。

segments.text: TREVOR: How about the encyclopaedia?
segments.translation: 特雷弗：到百科全书上找吧。

segments.text: JULIE: Nah ... not up-to-date enough!
segments.translation: 朱莉：别啊……那上面信息太过时了！

segments.text: TREVOR: Mmm ... why don't we call the embassy?
segments.translation: 特雷弗：嗯……直接打电话给大使馆怎么样？

segments.text: JULIE: Oh ... someone's enthusiastic!
segments.translation: 朱莉：哈……你热情挺高呀！

segments.text: TREVOR: Well ... if something's worth doing ...
segments.translation: 特雷弗：额……那得看值不值得做了……

segments.text: JULIE: I know ... it's worth doing well ... OK.
segments.translation: 朱莉：我懂啦……很值得做的。

segments.text: TREVOR: We can find out statistics on school places from them as well.
segments.translation: 特雷弗：学校分布情况的数据也可以问大使馆那边。

segments.text: JULIE: Might as well.
segments.translation: 朱莉：没错。

segments.text: TREVOR: Look, Julie, it's almost time for our tutorials ... we can meet again on Monday ... but we need to prepare some stuff before then ...
segments.translation: 特雷弗：朱莉，差不多该去上辅导课了……我们周一再碰面聊吧……这之前我们得稍微做些准备……
